name: Lingua Robot API
description: Text processing and dictionary API providing access to over 800,000 English lexical entries including words, phrasal verbs, and multi-word expressions. Features include word definitions, lemmatization, audio pronunciations, IPA transcriptions, inflection data, and morphemic analysis.

apis.name: Lingua Robot API
